title: Baalvion for Finance
excerpt: Trade finance, payments, compliance, and settlement — built on a double-entry ledger with real-time risk screening.

seo.title: Financial Technology Solutions | Baalvion
seo.description: Baalvion builds finance platforms with double-entry ledgering, real-time settlement, and AI compliance screening across 180+ jurisdictions.

challenges: Money movement that must always reconcile
Fraud at scale without blocking good customers
solutions: A double-entry ledger as the financial source of truth
AI-driven sanctions and risk screening in real time

blocks.text: Finance is the sector Baalvion knows most intimately — the [Baalvion Operating System](/platform) was built to move value across 198 markets. Financial systems have an unforgiving requirement: the money must always reconcile, every decision must be defensible, and nothing can be lost. We engineer to that bar.

items: **Integrity:** every movement must balance and reconcile, always.
**Compliance:** sanctions and KYC/AML screening across many jurisdictions, in real time.
**Settlement:** latency and reliance on a single rail create risk.
**Fraud:** stopping it without blocking legitimate customers.

blocks.text: We build on a double-entry ledger so every transaction balances, add real-time AI compliance screening as in [AI compliance scoring across 180+ jurisdictions](/case-studies/ai-compliance-scoring-platform), settle across multiple rails with idempotency and failover as in [real-time cross-border settlement](/case-studies/real-time-cross-border-settlement), and detect fraud with the hybrid engine from our [fraud detection](/case-studies/fraud-detection-engine) work.

Finance engagements draw on [enterprise software](/services/enterprise-software), [automation](/services/automation), and [AI solutions](/services/ai-solutions), with the strategy explored in [trade finance automation](/news/finance/trade-finance-automation) and [cross-border compliance AI](/news/finance/cross-border-compliance-ai).
Finance platforms that reconcile to the cent, clear faster across borders, screen every transaction in real time with auditable decisions, and stop more fraud while blocking fewer good customers.

faqs.a: It guarantees that every movement balances, making reconciliation and dispute resolution fast and trustworthy — the foundation of any serious finance platform.

faqs.q: How is compliance handled across jurisdictions?
faqs.a: Real-time AI screening over versioned sanctions data with auditable decisions across 180+ jurisdictions — see [our AI compliance case study](/case-studies/ai-compliance-scoring-platform).

faqs.q: How do you reduce settlement risk?
faqs.a: Multi-rail routing with automatic failover and idempotent settlement, so a single provider outage never halts the business.
